summary: Describes how late payment fines are configured in the system, including criteria for calculation (fixed amount, daily, or periodic increments).
steps: Define the fine criteria (e.g., fixed amount after due date, incremental amount after a period).
Set the last date for fee payment (e.g., 10th of August, 10th of November).
Configure the fine amount (e.g., Rs. 500 will be charged from the 11th, and an additional Rs. 500 will be added every 15 days thereafter).
During fee collection, the system automatically calculates and displays the fine based on the current date and configured rules.
business_rules: Fines are calculated based on predefined criteria and due dates.
Fine configuration applies to every course and every student.
important_notes: The fine calculation can be based on a fixed amount after the due date, or an incremental amount (e.g., every 15 days).
The system can also support daily incremental fines (e.g., Rs. 40 per day).
The fine will be calculated and shown at the time of fee collection.
questions: How are late payment fines configured in the ERP?
Can fines be set to increase daily or periodically?
How does the system calculate fines during fee collection?
Does the fine configuration apply to all students and courses?
